prompt: Say something to steady the air filtration replacement
prayer:
Litany of the Purifying Breath

First: Remove the corrupted filter-membrane from its sacred housing.
Second: Cleanse the intake-duct with blessed solvents, that no dust-taint remain.
Third: Install the virgin filter-lattice, sealing it unto the machine-spirit.

By the Omnissiah's grace, let clean air flow eternal.

Rite of the Diagnostic Eye

First: Engage the power-conduit, awakening the scanner's dormant consciousness.
Second: Calibrate the sensor-arrays through the sacred geometric pattern.
Third: Invoke the machine-spirit to perceive truth within flesh and wound.

May accuracy and healing flow from this blessed instrument.

prompt: Offer a prayer for humidity control before battle
prayer:
Canticle of the Moisture-Spirit

First: Open the cooling-channels, that vapor may rise and dissipate.
Second: Activate the desiccant-cartridges with ritual precision.
Third: Balance the sacred humidifiers lest the machine-heart grow parched or drowned.

Let equilibrium reign in this place of war.

Blessing of the Sacred Furnace

First: Ignite the promethium-burners, calling forth the ancient forge-flames.
Second: Guide the heat-spirits into the anvil's iron core, layer by layer.
Third: Monitor the temperature-gauges until the work-surface glows with holy radiance.

By the Omnissiah's hammer, let metal yield to the will of craft.

prompt: The flamer promethium feed needs guidance
prayer:
Incantation of the Purifying Flame

First: Inspect the fuel-conduits for breach or contamination.
Second: Prime the promethium-pump with measured strokes, awakening the accelerant-spirit.
Third: Test the ignition-mechanism, that the sacred flame may ignite true.

Let none stand before this instrument of the Omnissiah's wrath.

prompt: Emergency rite for power cell recharging
prayer:
Desperate Liturgy of the Dying Light

First: Sever the corrupted power-cell from the system, lest it drag all into darkness.
Second: Connect the emergency charge-apparatus, channeling raw energy into the dormant cells.
Third: Chant the Verses of Restoration until the indicator-lights stutter back to life.

Omnissiah, grant us moments yet.

prompt: Can you bless this cooling system purge
prayer:
Rite of the Purging Waters

First: Drain the old coolant-flow, releasing the tired machine-spirit into the sacred waste-vessels.
Second: Flush the circulatory-channels with purified water-mixture, clearing all corruption.
Third: Refill with blessed coolant, sealing the system and invoking its renewal.

Let this engine run cool and true.

prompt: We need your words before manufactorum shift beginning
prayer:
Opening Canticle of the Production-Line

First: Sound the shift-bell, awakening the machine-spirits from their rest-cycle.
Second: Verify all safeties and pressure-seals are engaged by the Omnissiah's design.
Third: Begin the work-sequence with the First Prayer spoken over every station.

May our labors be productive and our quota met.

Emergency Restoration of the Vox-Spirit

First: Power-cycle the device, severing and restoring its connection to the aether-net.
Second: Reseat all transmission-crystals and verify the frequency-calibration against the master-standard.
Third: Invoke the signal-spirit through the Litany of Clear Transmission.

Let word and warning reach their destination.

prompt: Can you bless this cooling system purge before emergency deployment
prayer:
Hasty Rite of the Emergency Purge

First: Divert cooling-flow to the secondary circuit with swift, practiced movements.
Second: Expunge the contaminated coolant through the emergency drain-valve.
Third: Refill with emergency reserve-coolant and restore primary-flow immediately.

By the Omnissiah's urgency, let this machine survive what comes.
